headline: Eli Lilly Expands Alzheimer’s Pipeline With AlzeCure Deal And Valuation Upside
summary: Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) has entered a collaboration and licensing agreement with AlzeCure Pharma for global rights to Alzstatin ACD680, a preclinical Alzheimer's therapy. The deal structure includes potential payments that could exceed US$1b if development, regulatory and commercial milestones are reached. The agreement expands Lilly's neuroscience and Alzheimer's disease pipeline beyond its existing focus on obesity and metabolic treatments. Eli Lilly is best known today for its obesity and...

headline: FDA approves Lilly's EBGLYSS® (lebrikizumab-lbkz) for one maintenance dose every eight weeks in patients with moderate-to-severe atopic dermatitis
summary: Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE: LLY) announced today that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) approved a regimen of one maintenance dose every eight weeks of a single injection (250 mg/2 mL) of EBGLYSS (lebrikizumab-lbkz) for subcutaneous use in adults and children 12 years of age and older who weigh at least 88 pounds (40 kg) with moderate-to-severe atopic dermatitis. EBGLYSS is already approved for a once-monthly maintenance dose, with long-term data showing durable disease control. Now,

content.title: FDA approves Lilly's EBGLYSS® (lebrikizumab-lbkz) for one maintenance dose every eight weeks in patients with moderate-to-severe atopic dermatitis

headline: Eli Lilly (LLY) Reports Positive Foundayo Weight Loss Data for Menopausal Women
summary: Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE:LLY) is one of the most profitable growth stocks to buy. On June 7, Eli Lilly’s oral GLP-1 medication, Foundayo (orforglipron), demonstrated significant efficacy in promoting weight loss for women across all stages of menopause.
